line: GROVE_LESSONS:

line: - Full-workspace verification surfaced an unrelated-but-real compile error in the TUI `TaskBlocked` pattern, so focused crate tests alone were insufficient proof.

line: GROVE_DECISIONS:

items: Kept alert behavior centralized in `crates/saw-daemon/src/alerter.rs` and removed duplicated watch-side suggestion/action logic in favor of `AlertNotification`.

line: - Preserved the daemon alerter’s dead suggestion text: `restart the Claude process to resume monitoring`.
